title: Pharos Agent Economy
narrations: Moving to 'Pharos Agent Economy'. High-performance EVM Layer 1 for Web2/Web3 fusion Built for RealFi, RWA, stablecoins and cross-chain interoperability Designed to support millions of autonomous AI Agents This is a key part of the value we are building onchain.

Moving to 'The Problem: Agents Cannot Explain Themselves'. Wallet analyzers, swaps and monitors only return JSON or text DAO members and users struggle to read raw on-chain data Project teams lack reusable, verifiable presentation tools This is a key part of the value we are building onchain.

Moving to 'PitchFlow: Agent Expression Layer'. Reusable Skill: any Agent can call Deck-to-Video API Generates narrated MP4, subtitles, cover and metadata Content hash registered on Pharos for provenance This is a key part of the value we are building onchain.

Moving to 'Composable On-chain Economy'. Wallet Analyzer → Report PPT → Narrated Video Payment / tipping via PaymentGate smart contract Distribution to Telegram, Discord, X and DAO forums This is a key part of the value we are building onchain.

Moving to 'Roadmap & Call to Action'. Skill stage: standard API + Pharos registry integration Agent Arena: full PitchFlow Agent with payments and social distribution Join us in building the communication infrastructure of Agent Economy This is a key part of the value we are building onchain.
